description: FX Online Japan prominently presents the English-speaker a potential hurdle right on the landing page of its website. It states: Please note: This site contains abridged content aimed at giving you a brief overview of our products and helping you to open an account. For further information and to view the full range of content available please view our Japanese-language site. Although this reviewer happens to have an English- and Japanese-speaking cousin who has lived and worked in Japan as a translator for a number of years, not everyone is so equipped. Regardless he was not available to assist in this review. In any case FXOnline and IG Markets are part of IG Group, which has several operating companies offering a variety of speculative products to a retail and professional client base. Aside from the corporate affiliation, that describes many other companies offering Forex trading services online as well. The company has been in operation since 2002. It has more than 800 employees, including a HQ in London and offices in Tokyo, Singapore, Chicago, Melbourne, Madrid, Paris, Dusseldorf, Milan, Stockholm and Luxembourg. An experienced executive team appears to have been drawn from around the world. FX Online’s financial results, including assets of 998 UK pounds (and no debt) are cited in its profile. FX Online offers its clients the use of the Pure Deal trading platform, which is web browser based. The Platform is advertised as featuring “Price Improvement” technology that can offer better prices than the one’s requested by a trader. The platform also offers mobile trading and iPhone trading. The range of markets accessed by FX Online extends to Forex, Stock Indices, CFDs, Energies and Metals, Binary Options, as well as Rates and Bonds. Demo accounts, education in the nature of CFDs and a video tour of the platform are also available to visitors to this website. That is quite a lot of content considering the warning at the top of the landing page. Support options are not really addressed at this location. Account sign up is available.

cons: No Bonuses; Missing Information
description: Global Market Index (GMI) is an online broker headquartered in Boston, USA with offices in a number of countries and regions such as the United States, Spain, Mexico, New Zealand, and others. GMI is regulated by the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) in Australia and was among the first to use Multilateral Trading Facility (MTF) for financial instrument trading.
pros: Choice of Many Platforms; Demo Account

description: FXCH is in reality the Foreign Exchange Clearing House. Traditionally financial clearinghouses settle financial transactions between two parties for a fee. FXCH’s services appear to reach beyond those basics into Forex and other types of financial trading.

FX stands for Forex, which stands for foreign exchange trading, which does describe at least one of the FxCompany’s reasons for being. FxCompany is owned by FxCompany Financial Group Ltd. Its activities comply with the legislation of Mauritius and are regulated by FSC (Financial Services Commission) of Mauritius. FxCompany employs the services of over 100 representatives “all around the world”. FxCompany also offers CFD (contract for difference) trading options to its customers. These include CFDs for stocks, futures, indices, metals and dividends. FxCompany also has “Moslem” Swap Free Accounts available. The trading platform available for download is MetaTrader 4 in Terminal, Multi Terminal, Mobile, and Smartphone editions. The FxCompany also references upwards of 400 trading tools designed to assist its account holders. Spelling out the nature of at least some of those tools could prove helpful to potential customers seeking to make a decision. A standard account offers spreads starting from 0.5 pips, leverage up to 1:500, multi-currency accounts in USD, EUR, etc. and a minimal deposit of 100 USD. FxCompany also offers a VIP account that features spreads starting at ZERO points, a free Pocket PC with MetaTrader 4 Mobile pre-installed, a Personal Account Manager and 5% interest to a client’s deposit. The company also offers partnership options. The exact details of those sorts of agreements seem to be available through more direct contact with the company than the website can offer. That is probably best-pursued offline in any case. Those new to trading can open a demo account with FxCompany. What marks that option as somewhat unique is the company’s practice of holding contests centered on demo trading that that reward the winners of such contests with real money. Unlike many competitive firms the FxCompany website does not offer any educational material that relates to trading Forex or CFDs online. 24/7 On-Line Support is advertised in a banner on the main page with no other details of that support provided.

cons: Unfair treatment of non-US traders due to stock commissions; Only bank-related payment processors
description: TradeStation is a US-based broker founded in 1982 as Omega Research. In 1987, the company released its first product, System Writer, which allowed traders to back-test their trading strategies using historical data. The release of System Write Plus in 1989 followed before its flagship product, TradeStation, was launched in 1991. It quickly gained popularity, and Omega Research signed an exclusive deal with Dow Jones Telerate to offer TradeStation to institutional clients globally. The success allowed the company to complete an initial public offering (IPO) in 1997, listing on the NASDAQ National Market. In 2000, TradeStation 6 entered the online brokerage market, followed by a 2001 restructuring of the firm to distinct between the brokerage and technology divisions. In 2011, Japan-based financial conglomerate Monex Group acquired TradeStation. Today, it remains a dominant online broker in the US retail market, where it continues to deploy cutting-edge technologies to grant its clients a competitive edge.
pros: Commission-free futures trading; Fast and reliable order execution with average speeds of 0.056 seconds; Cutting-edge trading platform with 180+ indicators

description:
Naming an enterprise after a venerable financial institution like Wall Street takes a certain amount of confidence and might even confuse the search engines. Wall Street Brokers appears to have that kind of confidence, regardless of the risk. The company describes itself as a “pioneer securities and commodities trading firm, offering retail traders, corporations, money managers and hedge funds the gateway to complete e-commerce and online trading services”.
The contact information the company provides points one to Wilmington DE 19810, USA. That covers Wall Street Brokers in geographical terms, but the website doesn’t provide much in the way of the history of Wall Street Brokers.
Wall Street Brokers describes its services as including:
- Tight Spreads
- Variety of Products
- Hedging Capability
- Low Margin Requirements
- No SWAP or Hidden Fees
- Superior Trading Software
- No Dealing Desk
- Multi-lingual Support
- Partnership Programs
As with many other such firms the platform offered for download is MetaTrader 4, a good, solid choice. Support options other than live chat are unclear.
The Wall Street Brokers website itself appears to have kept some Flash programmers busy for quite a while, but retains a good bit of focus nonetheless. The focus is on trading Forex and the product offered is comprised of three different account types designed to facilitate currency trading. They are a Standard account with a minimum deposit of $2,000, a leverage of up to 1:400, and a minimum lot size 0.1. A Mini account features a minimum deposit of $500, a leverage of up to 1:400, and a minimum lot size 0.1. A Micro account includes a minimum deposit of $10, a leverage of up to 1:500, and a minimum lot size 0.1.
Those new to Forex can partake of a section devoted to education in Forex right on site. One can open a Demo Account for free practice in Forex trading as well.

One might expect a company called Cobra Trading to be aggressive in presenting its services to potential customers. The Cobra Trading website does not disappoint in that regard. “Strike first in the market” is the motto the company appears to live by. In any case, Cobra Trading, Inc. offers futures and forex trading in addition to equities and options trading.
The overall impression one gets from the Cobra Trading website is a “let’s get started” attitude that summarizes the prices and option available for each of the services the company offers to online traders. There seems to be no real need on Cobra Trading’s part to offer any sort of detailed information, such as a company history, about Cobra Trading itself – other than the basic contact information relating to its location in Allen Texas.
It is mentioned on the site that Cobra Trading, Inc. is a member of FINRA, NFA, and SIPC, and clears through Penson Financial Services.
Cobra Trading offers multiple platforms: It sole online platform, CobraOnline, is an web-based trading platform for stocks and options that require no download whatsoever. Platforms described as direct access include: Cobra IQ for equities and options, OmniPro for a financial technology solution for institutional, retail, and automated traders (black box trading) and Sterling Trader Pro, a multi-purpose front-end trading platform. All platforms are designed to run on Windows 2000 or later PCs.
An excellent FAQ section offers answers to questions such as these:
How do I open an account with Cobra Trading, Inc.
What is the minimum to open an account?
How do I transfer an account to Cobra Trading, Inc.?
How do I fund my trading account?
When can I begin trading?
Support is offered and questions are answered via phone, fax and email. A live chat option is offered on the website itself for more urgent matters. Trading hours are 6:00 am EST thru 8:00 pm EST. Hours of operation are Monday through Friday 7 am to 5 pm CST.

Phillip Futures is an Asian financial house with a global reach offering futures options bullion and foreign exchange products. What was initially annoying was the offer that popped up asking us to execute a Java-based application (Phillips' Online Electronic Mart System (POEMS)), whose certificate could not be verified. I’m not a fan of running apps on my system that reach out of the cloud and ask permission to execute.
Nonetheless Phillips Futures is a pioneer in offering online trading services in Singapore. They offer 24-hour broking and execution services for a full range of futures, options and OTC products. Phillip Futures also provides e-trading connectivity to the CME Globex platform, the first global electronic trading system for futures and options and is now the world's premier marketplace for derivatives trading.
Phillips Futures also likes to emphasize investor education by providing regular public seminars that discuss a broad range of topics that are led by experienced brokers and industry experts. A unique educational feature offered by the company is a one-to-one coaching session designed for people who are interested in Futures and/ or Spot Forex/ Bullion trading but who do not have much knowledge of these products or the related markets. This sort of mentoring seems to go at least one step beyond the usual content found at other websites consisting of FAQs or web-linked tutorials that those new to trading need to browse on their own.
Phillips Futures conducts monthly demo sessions for their trading platforms. Phillip Futures offers a full range of trading platforms and one should really visit the platform comparison page to get a feel for the best platform for their individual or institutional trading needs. The amount of choices and options outlined in the chart found there can be a bit much to take in completely in one sitting.
In addition to providing trading platforms for institutional traders, Phillip Futures also provides business solutions and collaborations for corporate clients. APIs and White Labeling options figure prominently in those services.
We would have appreciated Phillips Futures outlining how they support their products to their customers more thoroughly. The site offers some intriguing possibilities otherwise.

Lloyds TSB Corporate Markets is a trading name of Lloyds TSB Bank plc and Lloyds TSB Scotland plc. Lloyds TSB Corporate Markets offers a variety of products and services for businesses with a turnover of more than £15 million a year. Their expertise in Corporate Markets is based upon years of experience of working in this market, offering offer distinctive financial, banking and advisory service for their customers.

If you need to sample a little background information on Alliance Investment Management as found on their website you may need to scroll down to the bottom of the page and click a tab labeled ABOUT US. “Bend down low let me tell you what I know” came to mind once we discovered that Alliance Investment Management Ltd. is located in Jamaica. The company is licensed by the Financial Services Commission of Jamaica under the Securities Act 1993. They provide asset management and financial advisory services to meet each client's specific needs. Alliance Investment Management is managed by an experienced team of professionals who have had successful careers in banking, investment and finance both locally and internationally. Pictures and names of the principals are provided. Alliance Investment Management states that it is committed to providing transparency and scrutiny in its operations. It provides links to summaries of its audited Financial Statements though 2007. In addition to providing asset management and investment planning services Alliance Investment Management is a licensed Cambio and trades in most major foreign currencies. The company also offers bill paying and remittance services. It can also facilitate the process of worldwide investing or opening of an online trading account. That account can allow clients to directly buy and sell stocks and other investment instruments listed on the NYSE, NASDAQ and AMEX exchanges. Financial tools offered at the website consist only of Loan Payment, Debt Management, Debt Reduction, Periodic Investment, Investment Return Spread and Inflation calculators. Another service offered at the website states that clients can borrow funds against their investments at “very attractive” interest rates. Details are obtainable from customer service representatives. Alliance Investment Management states that it offers highly personalized financial services to its clients. The website doesn’t outline how it supports those services in detail however.

FXFlat describes itself as “a broker for trading in the attractive Forex and CFD markets”. They may assume that your visit to their website has attracted you to them. This German company functions as an online presence for the asset management company Heyder Krueger & Colleagues. Since it’s founding in 1997 Heyder Krueger & Colleagues has specialized in financial consulting and asset management. That company is licensed by the German financial supervisory authorities and subject to their direct supervision.
FXFlat gives its clients access and use of a trading platform comprised of FlatTrader, FXFlat WebTrader and MobileTrader. These components work together to provide market access to FX and CFD traders from virtually anywhere on earth.
FlatTrader is designed to for trading a multitude of CFD derivates and Forex spot transactions.
FXFlat WebTrader adds internet functionality to features and functionalities found in a conventional download-trading platform. No download is required when using FXFlat on the web, however.
FXFlat MobileTrader brings mobile convenience to the execution of an ever-expanding set of trade related functions. In the case of MobileTrader it is necessary to visit FXFlat on the web for a rundown of exactly what your particular Blackberry, iPhone or PDA is capable of doing once MobileTrader is loaded onto your device.
Should you decide to open an account with them the team from FXFlat promises to be at your side daily from 08:00 a.m. to 22:00 p.m. Monday to Friday and commits its colleagues in London to 24 hours daily support on an absolutely for free basis.
FXFlat offers a demo account for training purposes as well and believes that its demo system is a critical element in its educational effort to ensure that clients have access to state of the art technology and accurate market information. Account types range from retail to institutional with FXFlat.

cons: Little Choice of Platforms; No Individual Stocks
pros: Very Competitive Spreads (low end); Scalping & Hedging

description: Nord Markets is an online broker company that specializes in Forex trading. On its website Nord Markets reviews its account options, customer service, and company history. The site allows users to learn about Forex trading using Nord Markets, and the advantages of choosing Nord Markets over its competitors.

NobleTrading, a subsidiary of LightSpeed Financial Inc, is an online brokerage company that specializes in the trading of a number of financial instruments. On its website NobleTrading reviews their trading options, information on trading markets and instruments, their account options and their company history. They also outline the trading platforms offered and their customer service options.
NobleTrading is based in New York City in the United States. It is at the forefront of online trading, first opening online trading options in 1999. The mission of the company is to provide direct access to US equity options and futures markets, to allow trading by both individual customers and large institutions. They aim to provide a supportive trading atmosphere with competitive services to allow for the financial success of their clients.
NobleTrading reviews their services for trading stocks and options, futures, and forex to private clients and institutions. Each trading instrument has a section of the website dedicated to outlining the advantages of trading the instrument with NobleTrading, as well as information on the software platforms available for trading. They offer a broker comparison for clients to weigh the advantages of working with NobleTrading.
NobleTrading reviews their account options on their site. Users can sign up for a demo account to trade in a number of markets with no real personal financial risk, and to allow clients to learn about the marketplace to help ensure their success trading real money. NobleTrading reviews their live account options, which allow for a range of down payments for account opening. Users can open an account online, and following a NobleTrading review, they can deposit funds into their account and begin trading on any of the company’s platforms. NobleTrading offers phone, email and live chat support to provide a positive trading experience for their customers.

Fast Brokers is an online broker company that specializes in the trading of futures and Forex. On its website, Fast Brokers reviews their account options, the benefits of choosing an account with the company, their company history, and their customer support options. They also offer information about trading Forex and futures online, so user can educate themselves on the details of the marketplace before choosing whether to invest in trading online.
Fast Brokers is headquartered in Glendale, California. The company mission is to provide fast and professional customer support, and provide all the education, software and tools needed for their customers to achieve financial success trading online. Fast Brokers reviews their high standards of quality that set them apart from their competition, and allow users t learn about the company to feel safe using their broker services to trade online.
Fast Brokers reviews their trading options for trading futures and Forex online. The company offers direct access to information to help clients make sound financial decisions when trading. Users can access to up to date market analysis and trends, as well as charts and software to help guide their trading. Fask Brokers reviews their trading platforms available. Users looking to trade futures can use the Trade Pulse, Trade Navigator or Fast Scalper programs, which offer a range of features to suit new and advanced traders. Users looking to trade Forex can do so using the FastFX, FastFX-PRO, and Currenex ECN platforms.
For those looking to open an account, application can be done online or over the phone. Following a Fast Brokers review, users can log into their accounts online to fund their account by wire transfer, PayPal, or credit card, and begin to trade online. Fast Brokers offers phone and email support to clients, to ensure a positive consumer experience trading online.

Pip Forex is an online trading site that offers broker services for trading forex. On its website, Pip Forex reviews it customer account options, its company history, customer service options, and reviews educational materials for users to learn about forex trading online. Pip Forex reviews the advantages of their company, to help users choose an online broker from a range of competitors.
Simray ASA, a Norwegian financial company, owns Pip Forex. The company’s mission is to provide a simple approach to forex trading online, to allow both individual investors and large financial institutions and experienced traders the opportunity to earn money trading forex online. On its site, Pip Forex reviews the basics of forex. They explain what forex is and how it is traded, the risks involved with trading forex online and the potential payoffs for high-risk investments. The site explains the meaning of commonly used terms in forex trading. User can sign up for a free forex guide that will explain the basics of forex trading, and guide users through their first few trades.
Pip Forex reviews it account options on its website. Users can sign up for a free demo account to trade forex online using the Pip Forex software platforms without any personal financial risk. Demo accounts are free and require only a valid email to sign up. Users can also apply for a live account online, a process that takes only a few minutes. Following a Pip Forex review of each application, users can fund their account and download an appropriate trading software platform to begin trading forex online. Users can connect with other customers using the online forums on the site, or contact customer service via phone or email to receive help with trading online.

Forex.ca is an online broker site that allows users to trade forex online. On its website, Forex.ca allows visitors to learn about the company, browse their account options and the advantages of choosing the company, learn about Forex and the trading options available on the site, and learn about the history of the company. Forex.ca is a subsidiary of Cash Forex Trading Inc, and was founded in 2005 as a way to allow users the chance to trade foreign exchange online, providing the same opportunities to individuals as to larger corporations. Forex.ca reviews extensively the basics of forex trading online. They provide information about what forex is, how it is traded, and the risks involved with trading forex. They also provide definitions to commonly used terms in forex trading to allow newcomers to online trading to learn the proper jargon. They provide explanations of analysis of the marketplace, and provide free charts to their customers to allow them to stay up to date on the changes in a dynamic marketplace. The platforms also offer free auto-trading so users can set preferences to buy and sell forex when the market reaches a pre-set point. This allows for users to trade on the go at their convenience. Forex.ca reviews their trading options for their customers. They allow trading on any of four trading software platforms, to allow users to customize their trading experience with the company. The company offers mini trading accounts which require only a small initial personal investment to begin trading, as well as standard accounts for those more comfortable with trading online and looking to trade larger amounts. Forex.ca offers new account bonuses, and easy online applications for new accounts, and cheap online courses to help users get started trading. Following a Forex.ca review of new applications, users can fund their mini or standard trading accounts to begin trading online. Forex.ca offers phone and email support to their clients to ensure a positive consumer experience.

LeverageFX is an online broker company that specializes in trading of forex online. On its website LeverageFX reviews it company history, trading options and forex education for new traders. The site also runs a number of interactive aspects to provide a sense of community along their clients. LeverageFX was founded in 2006 as a way to bring forex trading opportunities and training in forex trading online so to reach a broad audience. The site offers a range of software package options for users on its site, ranging from software designed for beginners to more advanced software for experienced traders and brokers. LeverageFX reviews its software options and allows users to compare packages to figure out which software will best suit their needs. Beginners may choose software that offers easy to follow trends that are green when the market is rising and red when the market is falling, to indicate when to buy or sell. More advanced users may appreciate more customizable software packages since they can choose which options to display, as well as have access to charts, and market analyses to make their trading decisions. On its website, LeverageFX reviews the pricing for its software packages, which can range from $150 per month to lease use of the software to $2000 to buy the software outright. The price includes the forex software of choice, as well as an account, forex charts, and access to forex trading systems. LeverageFX reviews its customer service options for current and prospective clients. The company offers support via email, love chat, phone and by skype. LeverageFX also runs a forum and a blog to create a sense of community among its clients, where clients can share trading tips and advice and help for newcomers to help ensure the financial success of those trading using LeverageFX software.
TFIFx is now operating under the name TFI Markets. See our TFI Markets review for more details.

ATC Brokers is an online broker company that provides the software and support required to allow users to trade forex and futures online. On its website, atcbrokers.com, ATC Brokers reviews its account options and software support options, as well as general information on forex trading and information for institutions looking to trade forex.
ATC Brokers was founded in 2005 with the mission to provide forex-trading opportunities to the general public, since at the time industry professionals mostly traded forex. The site offers a way for those new to trading to try their hand at trading forex online to earn money via investing.
ATC Brokers reviews its software options for interested traders. Clients of the company can trade using a number of software platforms, including ATC Trader, Ninja Trader, X-Trader, MetaTrader 4 ECN, or Active Trader. Each of these programs can be customized to suit the needs of beginner and advanced traders, and be customized to show important info that can affect the client’s trading decisions. ATC Brokers reviews its trading options: it offers automated trading, block account trading, data feed integration, custom indicators and API integration, all of which will help clients make smart, educated financial decisions when trading with the company.
ATC Brokers offers trading of futures as well forex. Users have access to a number of free charts, as well as technical and fundamental analyses of the marketplace, to help them choose when to buy and sell forex or futures. The site offers the basics of trading futures and forex to allow users to educate themselves on the rules of the marketplace before they begin trading.
ATC Brokers reviews its account options on its website. Users can apply for an account online by sending personal information and proof of ID. The application is subject to ATC Brokers review, and after approval they are able to fund their account and begin trading online. ATC Brokers offers phone and email customer support to its clients to attend to any questions or concerns clients have when trading online.

Advanced Futures is an online broker company that specializes in the trading of futures online, as well as trading of other instruments such as Forex. On its website, www.advancedfutures.com, Advanced Futures reviews their company profile, services and products available to customers, and contact information.
Advanced Futures was founded in 2009, it took input of young and experienced traders, with the goal of developing the most advanced yet easy to use trading platform online. To this end, they conducted surveys asking what users would look for in online trading, and then integrated these features into their website. To serve international customers, Advanced Futures offers customer service in over 20 languages, including English, French, Spanish, Italian, German, Danish, Cantonese, Russian and Turkish. An Advanced Futures review reveals the site also boasts low commission on their trading platform, to allow users to make the most profit possible from trading online.
Advanced Futures reviews their trading platform options on their site. Users can trade via the Turbo Trader 2, J-Trader, X_Trader, Strategy Runner, Ninja Trader, and GSTrader platforms, to allow almost unlimited customization of user experiences on the site. Advanced Futures also offers a number of forex trading platforms, including GS Trader FX, G.T.S., and G.T.S. Charting. Advanced Futures reviews the features of each platform, and provides users education for prospective and current users to allow them to choose the platform to best suit their needs, and learn to customize each platform to enhance their trading experience.
For those wishing to open trading accounts, Advanced Futures reviews the procedures required before trading. All users must fill out a registration form, and provide proof of identity to the company, either online or by mail. Upon Advanced Futures review and approval, users may fund their accounts, with a $250 minimum deposit required. Following this, users may download platforms and begin trading as they wish. Advanced Futures offers 24 hour support for customers to help ensure their success trading online.

Prime 4x, a division of PrimeForex LCC, is an online broker site that specializes in the trading of Forex online. A Prime 4x review reveals that the company is run out of Dubai, and offers Forex trading to users around the world. On its website, www.prime4x.com, Prime 4x reviews the options available for its customers, as well as Forex education required for new users to succeed in online trading. Founded in 2005, Prime 4ex has expanded to serve an international client base, made up on individual investors and institutions, and large corporations. On its site, Prime 4x reviews its company goals: to offer a secure and reliable trading platform with very competitive trading conditions, and to provide a wide range of financial options to suit the needs of private traders and large corporations. To this end, Prime 4x reviews several fundamental concepts required to trade Forex online successfully. Prime 4x reviews what Forex is, and talks about the fundamentals of trading Forex by defining the terms of the marketplace, pricing for currencies, and risk management. Prime 4x also provides a glossary of all key terms related to Forex trading to ensure its users understand market jargon. The site also offers advice on trading strategy, indicators in the marketplace, and psychology of trading that can affect success. Prime 4x reviews its account options available for online forex trading. Users can sign up or demo accounts to get practice trading forex online with virtual money in a marketplace that mimics the live market. Users can also apply for live accounts, designed for small, standard, or large investment sizes, or partnership accounts that allow handling of numerous accounts at once. All accounts are subject to prime 4x review, and once approved, can be used to trade forex using the MT4 platform. Prime 4x reviews its support options, which range from 24 hour help phones and email support lines, to help ensure a positive consumer experience.

cons: No Chat; No Bonuses or Promotions
description: FCMarket was founded in 2007 and is located at Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. FCMarket is the introducer of Hot Forex, owned by HF Markets Ltd which is licensed by the Financial Services Commission (FSC) of Saint Vincent and the Grenadines. FCMarket provides online trading platform for individuals that want to speculate on Forex and CFDs.
pros: Several Trading Accounts; Demo Account; MetaTrader 4 Platforms

description:
Advanced Markets was established in 2006 and is a Futures Commission Merchant (FCM) and Foreign Exchange Dealer (FDM), member of the National Futures Association (NFA) and registered with the Commodities Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). It has its headquarters in Charlotte, North Carolina. The focus at this company is giving the customers what they desire and deserve: great pricing, great service and fast and efficient execution. This is facilitated in large part by the efforts made to create and maintain relationships with leading foreign exchange banks, interbank participants that make up the price liquidity of the foreign exchange market.
Both trading platforms used by Advanced Markets have been thoroughly tested and provide the best bid/offer with market depth from multiple banks. With the input of specialist trading technology firms, advanced trading clients are given the best possible environment to use their own trading strategies. The choice of which platform is personal but for those with more advanced needs, Advanced Trader 2 is more suitable. For the others, Advanced Trader 1 is the platform of choice. A very handy chart has been provided to show a comparison between the two and facilitate decision-making.
One’s choice of broker is a huge factor in determining one’s success in the trading field, especially forex that features a high level of risk. Advanced Markets serves as a wonderful partner, having been created with care and expertise to give its customers the best advantage. Their philosophy is uniform, no matter if the client is an individual or an institution.
Advanced Markets provides these services among others:
-Round the clock technical support
-Instant Execution
-They do not trade against the client
-One-click or two-click trading
-No re-prices or re-quotes
-Trader’s choice of margin level up to 1% margin
-No deal desk.
The Advanced Markets website is replete with information about the company, its partners, its principles of operation and its goals, starting accounts, and the forex world. The demo accounts enable prospective clients to try before they join, helping them decide what level they wish to trade at and which platform they wish to choose. It takes the guesswork out of trading and makes for a sounder knowledge base.
Advanced Markets stands for fair trading always. It aims at bridging the gap between the institutional and retail forex worlds. It strives to provide all its clients with an equitable, reliable and technologically advanced trading environment in which to grow and enrich their knowledge and their finances.

Norvik Banka in Latvia was established on April 29, 1992 as “Lateko Banka”. Since then, this bank has been an international presence, offering its services to a wide variety of clients. When it acquired a new strategic investor, its name was changed to Norvik Banka. With more than 600 employees, this bank has in excess of 70 branches in Latvia and has a representative office in Moscow Russia. Besides personal and corporate banking, either online or via ATMs, Norvik Banka offers financial services for individuals and companies. These include Margin Trading, brokerage services, investment gold, and Trust services. In the field of Foreign Exchange, it converts all basic Freely Convertible Currencies as well as CIS currencies. The Trading platforms offered are Hotspot FX and LAVA trading for the most active traders. One of the unique features of Norvik Banka is quoting the wide range of available currencies against the Russian Ruble. The Belarus ruble and the Kazakh Tenge widen the bank’s range of currencies. Their Margin Trading on the forex market section is very extensive and gives good examples to enable a sound understanding of the procedure. All Freely Convertible Currencies are quoted against the US Dollar. The transactions can be done via phone or trading platforms. It is an active participant in the Forex market. It keenly watches trends in the foreign exchange sphere and introduces new ideas and technologies all the time. In terms of brokerage services, Norvik Banka allows customers to trade with ease on all the world’s major stock exchanges and work with the whole range of investment instruments through one broker. This website is very comprehensive in that it covers company matters like how and when it was established as well as its credit ratings, and moves on to Personal banking, corporate banking, rates and trading charges, documents and a financial center. It is quite easy to understand and acquire the necessary knowledge and data before or during trading. Financial results of the company are easy to access year-wise. It also allows demo trading so customers can practice before they acquire a degree of comfort and can go for the real thing. When they make this decision, there is more than adequate support available online. This Bank aims to be among the leaders in Latvia and a significant player in the Baltic market, to grow, and to give its best service to customers. Norvik Banka stresses on quality, speed, accuracy, organization and qualified personnel.

Frontel Corporation is not a brokerage firm or middleman and that is what makes this organization stand out. They provide their customers with the requisite tools and education to deal directly with the markets. Clients have their own self-trading account and, therefore, autonomy and full control. Frontel thus performs facilitative functions. The Forex market is fast-paced and exciting, and current news enables decision-making in this dynamic environment. This is what Frontel offers on its website by means of its daily morning reports and its day-end Trading Day Roundup. Some of the advantages of dealing with Frontel are: -A high stress on security and safety of funds. -Easy Bank Wire Transfer of funds from anywhere in the world. -Emphasis on establishing trust with its clients. -Spreads from .5 pips -Zero commissions, no middlemen. -Account-opening minimum is $10. Frontel is the place where trading options features transparency, ease and economy! The platform used is SmartTrader. The tightest spreads have been achieved for customers by pooling and striking deals with a large group of liquidity providers. The Full Disclosure policy is what makes for the transparency in options trading, especially if one studies the Strategy Optimizer. The Options Premium Calculator is a powerful tool that shows the optimum price that ought to be paid for an option as well as how the option will evolve. This interface predicts an option’s worth as the market fluctuates. Frontel enables direct trading online as well as one-to-one trading so there is immediate access to and interaction with experts, the entire experience being personalized. This website is very eye-catching as its home page features people moving about inside a business office environment with charts in the background. This will, right away, evoke and hold interest! There is streaming news at the top with the latest headlines. So this website is quite unique! In addition to this, there is an abundance of information. In one section, Learning tools for the beginner, and in another, Trading tools when one wants to launch into trading or continue with trading as the case may be. Frontel’s mission is very clear. It helps its clients make money through market comprehension and risk management. They stress on the latest technology and updated information for decision-making. The atmosphere is vibrant, given the speed and competition in these markets. Their hallmark is their Market News Desk: they use their wisdom and make effective predictions at the start of a trading day. Frontel likes to think of itself as a friend and partner to its customers. This corporation believes in surpassing it's own promises!

FXCBS is an online broker agency that specializes in the trading of Forex online. On its website, www.fxcbs.com, FXCBS reviews its company information, education for new forex traders, and outlines its account options for those looking to pursue trading online. Its website shows the company’s dedication to a positive consumer experience by providing all the information needed to successfully trade Forex online. FXCBS, which stands for FOREX Central Brokerage Service, was created in response to unfair trading environments promoted by past brokerage firms. The mission of FXCBS is to offer unique services and provide their clients with the best resources and conditions possible to succeed in trading online. To this end, the site strikes to provide its customers access to top of the line trading platforms, and unmatched customer support to ensure a positive client experience. On its website, FXCBS reviews how their trading system is different from many others on the market. FXCBS works using ECN forex trading, which is distinct in that customers can trade of prices provided by a number of large banks, organizations, and clients. This provides small markets with proper access required to trade fairly. FXCBS reviews their two available trading platforms: MetaTrader 4, and Central Station. MetaTrader 4 is an advanced program that is considered to be among the best trading platforms for its customizability and ease of use. Central Station, which is developed by FXCBS, is designed for professional traders and more advanced users, to allow greater options for trading online. FXCBS reviews its account options: users can register for a demo account or a number of live accounts. Demo accounts are available for both platforms, and allow users to gain a feel for online forex trading. Live accounts can be opened online and, after an FXCBS review, can be funded by a variety of methods. FXCBS offers 24 hour live support to demo and real traders, to ensure the success of its clients.

Lightspeed Trading is an online brokerage service offering access to trading a variety of financial instruments online. On its website, www.lightspeed.con, Lightspeed Trading reviews its company history, and services offered to clients. Lightspeed Trading was founded in 2001, and has expanded to serve clients on an international basis. The site offers profiles on its management, to provide a small-company feel in contrast to many of its corporate competitors. The site also features a blog written by the CEO of the company, which is updated every few weeks for users to view a professional’s reaction to changes in the market and economy. Lightspeed Trading reviews its emphasis on social networking: the company has a presence on Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. On its website, Lightspeed Trading reviews the tools and education required to make sound decisions training online. The site features a video learning library, where new users can watch a number of video series including the Trader Truth and Trader Talk video series, and a number of training videos. Users can also learn the basics of the financial instruments traded on the site, including forex, equities, futures and options. Additionally, Lightspeed Trading reviews news and research in the field of trading, and technical analysis to help users understand changes in the marketplace. Lightspeed Trading reviews its account options on its website. Users can sign up for a free demo account that will allow them access to the trading platform using virtual money, to get a feel for online trading without persona financial risk. Additionally, users can register for a live account. Accounts may be opened to trade a number of instruments, and can be done online preceding a Lightspeed Trading review. Once approved, accounts can be funded by a number of means, and users can begin to trade online. Lightspeed Trading offers around the clock phone, email and chat support for its clients.

Spread Co is an online brokerage service that facilitates trading of forex, CFDs and spreads online. On its website, www.spreadco.com, Spread Co reviews its company history, dedication to its consumers, and its account options for prospective clients. Spread Co was founded in 2005 and is based out of London in the United Kingdom. Spread Co is dedicated to supporting its clients, which include personal investors, institutions, corporations, banks, brokers and financial intermediaries. Although it is a UK-based firm, Spread Co offers its services to customers around the globe. For users new to online trading, Spread Co reviews the basics of trading to help educate its users before they make the decision to trade online. The site features a frequently asked question section, which provides information about what forex, CFDs and spreads are, and how they are traded online. Spread Co reviews the rules of trading, as well as provides help on all aspects of using the site, from opening an account to using the trading platform software. Trading at Spread Co is done via the Saturn TRADER online software package. Saturn TRADER was developed by Spread Co, and can be accessed online via web browsers, or can be downloaded and installed onto a user’s computer. Spread Co reviews the advantages of the platform: it is customizable and includes charts to allow users to keep up to date on changes to the market. Unlike some competitors, Spread Co offers the platform to its account holders at no cost. Users looking to enter the market of online trading may sign up for a demo account at Spread Co. Registration requires only a valid email address, and allows users to begin to trade online with no personal risk. On its site, Spread Co reviews the advantages of their live accounts, which are geared towards forex, CFD and spread trading. Application is easy and can be done online, and following a Spread Co review, the account may be funded to allow trading. Spread Co provides phone and email support to attend to the questions and concerns of its clients.

cons: Sparse FAQ section; Limited Bonuses
description: *** HY Markets has been re-branded as HYCM. See our updated HYCM review.
pros: Choice of Accounts; Demo Account Available; Several Platforms

description: Forex Metal is self-described as providing services that allow customers to trade on Forex (Foreign Exchange) and CFD (contract for difference) online. The Forex Metal website mentions its professional team with years of experience to assist its clients with trading. Not much more, if anything, is offered regarding the company’s origins, location or history.

Open E Cry, LLC (OEC) was founded in 2002. It maintains headquarters in Powell, Ohio. The online brokerage company focuses on its core product called the OEC Trader for futures, Forex and equity trading. OEC was acquired by optionsXpress Holdings, Inc. on July 1, 2008 and is now a subsidiary of that firm. Open E Cry supports active traders, institutional clients, introducing brokers and API developers in their use of OEC’s proprietary trading technology. In essence the firm provides brokerage services along with proprietary technology that is used to provide those services. Open E Cry offers both 24-hour software support and a 24-hour trade desk to answer any questions an active trader may have. It emphasizes the fact that active traders to serve active trader needs created its OEC Trader platform in large measure. Institutional clients are invited to take advantage of a set of complex systems and order routing technology specifically designed to meet the high standards demanded by high volume commodities and futures traders. Open E Cry cites its origins as an IB (instituting broker) in promoting its services and although it has grown into a Futures Commission Merchant and software developer, it promises to build its trading offerings with the needs of both the foreign and domestic introducing broker in mind. One cannot help but wonder whether the company’s intense focus on software creation and development might interfere with the interests and needs of its clients at times. If the above claims are to be believed the answer from OEC is that it won’t. Unlike many trading firms that use a proprietary platform Open E Cry actually offers an Application Programming Interface (API) option to software developers who might want to expand or extend the technology behind OEC’s platform to suit their own needs and clientele. Custom programming services are also available. If everything (services and software etc.) available from Open E Cry works together as it should the results could be interesting indeed.

RetailFX is a company that focuses on Foreign Exchange (Forex) trading. Estimated volume for that particular market is pegged over $3.2 trillion a day. Trading there can be open-ended and risky. RetailFX's founders have been active in risk management for more than 10 years. It describes its mission as providing “customers from around the world with sophisticated backend trading and hedging technology combined with personal customer service.” RetailFX Ltd. is a registered Cypriot Investment Firm (CIF) with the Cypriot Securities & Exchange Commission (CySEC). It states that it adheres to the regulatory standards of the European financial authorities and follows precise due diligence procedures and trading practices. It suggests that potential customers visit the CySEC website for verification purposes. The essence of Forex trading involves trading currency pairs and RetailFX provides a comprehensive list of those pairs and their spreads under the services tab of its main web page. The website is commendable for its simplicity and tools for signing up and trading seem to be readily available. Under its FAQ section RetailFX states that it assumes “that every trader that registers at RetailFX is trading Forex for the first time.” This could indeed be good news for the first time trader. Free guides and tutorials are only available if you are willing to surrender the company your email address. A Forex glossary is accessible at the website itself. RetailFX offers a demo account option and also states that its trading platform called WebTrader is ready for use on the web without requiring a download. That serves to differentiate it from many of its competitors. The typical claims regarding value for dollar and minimization of risk are made here as well. The disclaimer section does offer some possibly bad news to certain potential customers, however. Along with the usual warning about risk is a prominently displayed proviso: “Please note, RetailFX does not accept any trading activity from U.S based customers.”

Starting out in the United Kingdom in 1994 Options Direct Limited, ODL Markets is an independent FOREX, derivatives, equity and commodity trading house. Affiliate activities now encompass operations in Australia, Japan and Turkey. ODL employs over 200 staff around the world. On its website ODL Markets Limited lets one know that it is authorized and regulated by the Financial Services Authority. It is a member of the London Stock Exchange and NYSE Euronext. ODL Markets is somewhat unique in the versatile services it offers to clients on its website. These services include trading in Foreign Exchange (Forex), Gold, Oil and global indices in one account. Involvement in global markets can include spread betting. Spread betting is essentially what it sounds like. Spread bets do not involve the purchase of a commodity, a stock or a share. Spread bettors bet on the direction that the market or share price will go in within a particular market. Bets are placed in pennies or in points. The spread is the Sell (Bid) and Buy (Offer) price quoted by a spread betting company. This price is determined by calculating the live (or the estimated future) market price of a financial product. In keeping with the variety of trading opportunities available ODL Markets offers a variety of software platforms to facilitate those opportunities. These include MetaTrader 4, a common choice for Forex trading. Strategy Runner is geared toward letting futures traders access futures markets in the UK, Europe and USA, all from a single login. My Broker sports live streaming of multiple market data including technical analysis, as well as fundamental company data and news sources. Institutional platforms available include Currenex, Integral, Hot Spot and Lava for working with ODL Capital, which is the prime brokerage division of ODL Markets Ltd. Demo versions of most platforms are available as well as demo accounts for Forex. Also available are introductory educational materials designed to prepare traders for real-world trading.

TransMarket Group, LLC ("TMG") describes itself as a privately held global proprietary trading company. It was founded as Aardvark Financial Inc. in 1980. TMG began as a trader of futures locals and now trades most liquid financial products around the world. Rapid growth in the retail sector and institutional clients, as well as the diversification of the underlying markets, spurred the company to change its name in 1984 to the TransMarket Group ("TransMarket"). Over the years the company has committed significant resources to leverage technology as the foundation for executing customized trading strategies. This includes participation in the global exchange listed derivatives, equities, commodities, and selected cash markets. TMG maintains offices in several of the world’s financial centers designed to capitalize on a variety of trading opportunities in the global markets. TMG has 350 employees worldwide. Its staff is by no means limited to skilled professional traders, but also includes IT professionals, software developers, quantitative trade development staff, finance and operations, and administrative staff. At the beginning of this century TMG began a concerted effort to create advanced proprietary analytics and trade execution software to provide a competitive edge in the marketplace. Eventually this evolved into algorithm/systemic trading capabilities and strategies. That in turn necessitated enhancements of its global network, operating systems, and IT services for superior speed and reliability. TransMarket Group’s current mission is to provide a comprehensive suite of products and resources that enable its traders to maximize their potential. Traders receive access to a diverse array of international marketplaces, trading platforms, and informational resources. Its services include the provision of risk capital and market access to clients for the purpose of trading on the global financial markets. Traders and the global technology staff work together to enhance its systems and develop customized diverse trading opportunities across the world’s marketplaces. The company’s main website is best used as a contact point to begin exploring the sophisticated variety of services TMG offers to its clients.

Hotspot FX is a company that pioneered Forex trading electronically. Hotspot FX LLC is a wholly owned subsidiary of Hotspot FX Holdings, Inc. Hotspot FX Holdings, Inc. is a subsidiary of Knight Capital Group, Inc. Hotspot FX Holdings, Inc.'s main office is in Jersey City, New Jersey. It maintains offices in Chicago, London, and Singapore as well. The company describes itself as “innovating” the ECN model for institutional foreign exchange trading. What this provides to buy-side traders is centralized price discovery, and fully transparent, executable, neutral, real-time multibank prices. Its applications include full depth-of-market view, which enables investors to see all bids and offers in the market; to trade instantly and anonymously on live prices and enter bids and offers to better their execution price; and a suite of real-time and historical multibank market data, which enables institutions to analyze and benchmark their FX trade executions. The Hotspot FX website seems to place great emphasis on institutional Forex trading and any evidence of a retail option is less than obvious. In fact, Hotspot FX sold off its retail division to FXCM and, as February 13, 2009, has ceased offering retail Forex trading services to its customers. Its institutional trading platform, Hotspot FX appears to be proprietary and offers the following features: Automated order execution. That means all deals on Hotspot FX are executed electronically without any dealer involvement or a dealing desk. Although re-quotes are common in traditional spread trading, Hotspot FX does not re-quote and strives to fill trades at the price shown on the screen. Every trader that uses Hotspot FX has the option of being a market maker. That enables one to enter one’s own bids and offers into the platform either inside or outside the spread. This website and the company behind it have evolved into an institutional Forex trader/broker. Hotspot FX appears to serve the needs of the institutional Forex community quite adequately.

The Forex Trading USA website appears to welcome all comers to the world of Foreign Exchange trading. This company, based in Miami, Florida, also appears to exist mostly in the present, based on the “About Us” tab accessible from their home page. We are assured there that “The Forex Trading USA team is made up of professionals with extensive experience in the fields of trading and investing.” That information is not really substantiated in any meaningful way.

FX Clearing carries on business as an online Forex dealer for foreign investors. It is located in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada. The company takes the somewhat unusual step of establishing its legitimacy and authenticity by making facsimiles of both its Articles of Incorporation and a FinTRAC Registration Page available for viewing by any or all of its potential clients. FinTRAC is a Canadian government anti-money laundering organization. The firm appears to have been operating since September 15, 2006. FX Clearing offers a download of MetaTrader 4. This widely used platform is said to offer traders powerful features including intelligence and analysis of the Foreign Exchange market, which can help them to trading profitably there. Just some of these features are trading from the charts, real-time pricing, and a large number of technical indicators and line studies. The version of MetaTrader 4 offered for download by FX Clearing allows one to trade on both demo and live accounts. In fact you may open as many as 8 live trading accounts, with FX Clearing provided they all have the same account owner. FX Clearing seems keen on attracting new foreign business as evinced by a number of different promotions. At the time of this review some were listed as follows: FOR MICRO-CENTS ACCOUNTS: · Deposit at least $100 and receive 10% credit. · Deposit at least $500 and receive 15% credit. · Deposit at least $1,000 and receive 20% credit (up to $300 credit per account). FOR MINI ACCOUNTS: · Deposit at least $100 and receive 10% credit (up to $200 credit per account). A “Birthday Promo” promises a surprise gift on your birthday if you deposit a given amount of money with the firm. Please verify the particulars of all promotions mentioned with FX Clearing itself. It is important to note (as the company does in its FAQ section) that FX Clearing accepts no Canadian clients ostensibly because “There is no forex licensing in Canada, and we are not required to obtain a security license if no Canadian clients are solicited or accepted”. Clients originating in the USA are not accepted either as this would necessitate FX Clearing opening an office in the USA and registering with US authorities. The company has no plan to do this.

Update: As of December 2012, FXdirekt was closed down by BaFin, the German Federal Financial Supervisory Authority for repeatedly scamming clients. It is alleged that among other things, FXdirekt employees created a system through which they showed traders how to trade successfully in their demo account but not in their live account, causing them to lose their money.

cons: Weak FAQ Section; Scarcity of Data on Demo Account
description: FXGM is a registered brand name of Depaho Ltd. FXGM is located in Nicosia, Cyprus. The company was founded in 2006 and is regulated by several different regulatory agencies. FXGM is registered as a Cyprus Investment Firm (CIF) under the Cyprus Securities and Exchange Commission, CySec. Depaho Ltd. operates in accordance with the Markets in Financial Instruments Directive (MiFID) of the European Union. MiFID provides a harmonized regulatory environment for investment services across the European Economic Area (EEA). FXGM offers investors the opportunity to trade Forex, stocks, commodities and indices with a top broker in the Forex industry.
pros: Highly Regulated; Award Winning Broker; Choice of Many Accounts

description: Advantage Futures back its claim of being one of the highest volume clearing firms in the worldwide financial industry by citing the fact that it has cleared over 1.6 billion contracts. To the uninitiated firms like Advanced Futures settle financial transactions between two parties for a fee. This allows clients to trade with the confidence that certain glitches, holdups or possible evidence of a lack of liquidity or integrity will be dealt with without the trading party who hired those services becoming overly involved or encumbered by such a problem. It has taken Advantage Futures around 6 years to accomplish the clearing of its 1.6 billion contracts. Further historical background regarding Advantage Future’s services can be found in the website’s profiles of its management team. The company has expanded considerably since its inception under CEO Joseph Guinan as a boutique operation that employed only 28 people in 2003. Advantage Futures had over $374 million in client funds on deposit as of August 2009. Employee numbers don’t seem to be cited in the company’s web presence. Advantage Futures execution and clearing services are offered along with value-added trade suggestions. A direct-to-floor sales team for at high volume trade execution and value added trading strategies provides execution services. A value-added sales team provides hedge fund clients, portfolio managers and institutional traders with tailored research and analysis. A 24-hour global execution desk features infrastructure and personnel that provide clients with execution and market information. Advantage Futures also provides comprehensive clearing and margining services, risk management in real-time. The company also heralds its server co-location services as providing a fast, cost-efficient way to initiate trading applications and black box operations. A 24-hour technology support team is available for any execution platform a client may be using. Advantage Futures supports two trading locations in the Chicago area.

City Credit Capital offers its clients “Forex and CFD trading with vision”. One would certainly not want to approach those high-risk markets with blinders on. It’s a little scarce when it comes to company history or personnel in print. A link to a playable corporate video does a good job of outlining the services the company offers, however. MarketsTrader can be operated strictly as a web-based platform or downloaded for operation from a PC. An initial landing on the City Credit Capital website presents you with an opportunity to run an application called Web Chart. You are assured that the application’s digital signature has been verified. If that is enough of an assurance you can run it. We chose not to. We are only reviewing City Credit Capital’s web presence not yet partnering with it on such intimate terms. Credit Suisse is a Forex banking and investment company with headquarters in Switzerland and locations worldwide. Their comprehensive website www.credit-suisse.com, offers prospective customers and current clients a good amount of information that is presented in a professional, easy to read style.
Credit Suisse is an established and reputable Forex broker with an international presence and the website is designed to cater to customers at any of their worldwide locations. In their capacity as bankers, Credit Suisse provides a number of standard services such as personal banking, loans and mortgages, investments and wealth management.
In addition to this, Credit Suisse offers expert consultations in regards to financial planning for all stages of life, whether a student, a first-time home buyer or someone reaching retirement age. Many financial planning tools and calculators are available on the website and the user can download and print articles and forms from the ‘publication shop’. In addition to providing personal banking and Forex services, including secure online banking, Credit Suisse claims to provide ‘innovative solutions’ to corporations and governments and gives personal profiles of their individual office heads and managers. As well as being interesting, this gives the company a ‘human’ image, unlike many similar large, impersonal banking and Forex institutions.
Credit Suisse has a hand in many humanitarian and sponsorship projects around the world, most of which are detailed in both the company newsletter and online magazine. Another helpful feature on the site is the Credit Suisse job section where students, graduates and banking professionals can search the company database for exciting international job opportunities. The company appears to have a particular interest in aiding students, providing an apprentice program and campus recruitments.
While Credit Suisse has obviously put a lot of care and detail into giving the consumer a detailed and information-packed website that covers all areas of the company, the disadvantage is that it can be a little overwhelming and is not always easy to navigate. Apart from this, and based on our Credit Suisse review, it really is the best site to learn about this esteemed institution.

pros: Demo Account; MT4 and MT5 Platforms

description: CMS Forex is a Forex trading site based in New York. It was founded in 1999 by successful Forex traders and brokers, and software developers. The education portion of the CMS Forex site offers information to guide you through each step of using the site. The Foreign Exchange market, also referred to as the "Forex" or "Retail forex" or "FX", is the largest financial market in the world, with a volume estimated to be over $3.2 trillion a day. Like any financial market trading on the Forex market involves a certain amount of risk. In fact, it is commonly assumed that only 20% of traders involved in this market make any kind of profit at all. FXall is just one of many sites that offer assistance designed to give inexperienced and veteran traders all the edge they need to make money trading Forex. One of the characteristics of this market is its openness to individual traders as opposed to institutional ones. It is true, however, that even individuals are likely to need a platform and tools to participate in this market in a meaningful way. FXall offers both brokerage services and a software platform designed to facilitate trader activities. The company also states repeatedly that its principals do not trade in the market themselves. Their interest in the matter is the interest of their clients. FXall offers most of the services expected from similar operations. These include an in-house trading platform called QuickTrade By FXall, Stop Order and Limit Order services designed to limit the risk posed by sudden fluctuations in the market. Its Trailing Stop Order service is designed to both limit losses and maximize profits. A neat trick when it works. The company also offers 24-hour trading, which is a necessity because Forex trading does occur on an almost 24/7 basis at least somewhere around the world. One notable absence is the lack of a free demo account. Many people think that the best way to learn how to trade in the Forex market is to make a number of practice trades before one starts risking their own capital on the Foreign Exchange market itself.

FX Trading is a financial consultant company and foreign exchange provider that offers advice and expertise, as well as account support for Forex trading. FX Trading allows registration of both demo and live accounts to allow Forex trading on the Metatrader 4 platform. FX Trading offers education on Forex trading for newcomers to foreign exchange trading, and provides data on current market conditions to help its clients make smart trading decisions. The education portion of FX Trading covers the basics a new user needs to know to begin Forex trading online. The site offers basic information about what Forex is and how it is traded, a breakdown of market hours and the currency symbols used in Forex trading. They also provide a short of Forex trading and explain the recent availability of Forex trading to the general public. The site explains the differences between trading Forex and trading equity, to help a new user understand exactly how the Forex trading market words in relation to the stock market. FX Trading also acknowledges the high risk associated with Forex trading, to allow users to make educated financial decisions. Finally, the site offers a guide to Learn to Trade Forex in Seven Steps, a quick explanation of how Forex trading works online. FX Trading offers both demo and live trading accounts. Demo accounts are free, and require a valid email account and installation of the Metatrader 4 software. Demo account holders have access to 24 hour technical support online. Live account registration can be done online or through the mail, and funds can be deposited and withdrawn online for ease of use. To protect the security of its clients, FX Trading provides negative balance control, to help ensure clients will not acquire a negative balance during trading. FX Trading also offers 24 hour phone and online support and advice for all users.

Euro Pacific provides an attractive working environment.

Union Pacific Limited is among the premier brokerage companies in the field of Forex. FXOpen was founded in 2005 and has since become one of the fastest-growing and most impressive brokerages on the market today. Regulated in Nevis, a light regulatory approach combines with technology and a forward-thinking management team.

AL Trade offers its clients 24-hour access to the Foreign Exchange market commonly called Forex. Capital Spreads is a division of London Capital Group Holdings plc, which was founded in London in 1996 as a proprietary trading business. In 2003 that company restructured and became a prominent participant in financial spread betting when it launched Capital Spreads.

EFG-Hermes’ website makes it is easy to determine that EFG-Hermes is the Arab world's premier investment banking firm and the market leader in securities brokerage, asset management, investment banking, private equity and research. The firm can be found listed on both the Egyptian and London stock exchanges. As of 2008 its market capitalization exceeded US$ 3.5 billion. Its insight into regional markets is gained thanks to years of experience trading in those markets. The company’s self reported record of success in all the areas it serves is worth noting. For the most part so is its website. It was, however, somewhat surprising to following the links under “SECURITIES BROKERAGE” to “Become A Client” and further to “Institutional” only to find the words “Under Construction” a similar link to “Individual” produced a similar “Under Construction” notice. We are in the 21st century and these sorts of notifications are troubling when found on the website run by firm with a market capitalization that exceeds US$ 3.5 billion. EFG-Hermes employs over 880 people from more than 30 nationalities and services clients from 13 offices across the region. On a routine check of this brokerage in January 2018 we discovered that the URL redirect to a foreign language website and that the brokerage is no longer open for business. If you're looking for a reliable Forex broker, we recommend choosing from our top broker listing.

One of the more refreshing elements of the website from FX Universal is its initial simplicity. Right next to the company’s logo one finds the phrase “World Class Online Forex Trading”– a simple mission statement indeed. Along the top of the page run the headings: HOME, LEARN, TRADE, PLATFORMS, SIGNALS, TOOLS, and ABOUT. The overall impression is one that promises ease of use, at the very least. The ABOUT section describes FX Universal LLC as “a world class provider of Forex (foreign exchange) and spot metal trading services”. Unlike some other similar sites that feature brief histories of the firms offering such services FX Universal has chosen to skip providing even a hint as to how the company came to be. A certain amount of assurance of integrity and experience that might normally be provided by a company history is perhaps furnished by a mention in the FX Universal company profile that all FX Universal client funds are deposited with FX Solutions and that FX Solutions is accountable to the stringent standards of capital adequacy and financial reporting enforced by the National Futures Association. FX Universal’s services include instant access to the foreign exchange market and the ability to speculate in 28 of the worlds most commonly traded currency pairs as well as spot gold and silver. FX Universal also makes real-time streaming quotes available. Additionally it offers charting with proprietary price feed, tight spreads, and integrated streaming news. The two platforms that help to provide FX Universal’s services are Global Trading System (GTS) and MetaTrader 4. GTS is a suite of proprietary software developed by FX Solutions featuring one-click trading, automatic execution and multiple order types. MetaTrader 4 is accurately described as the industry’s leading platform for Forex trading and is used by a number of competing websites and companies that offer similar services. Free demos are available for both platforms. These promise to allow those new to Forex to experience real-time Forex trading without the risk that such trading normally poses. A Forex video presentation, a Forex glossary and other more traditional educative content are also available from the FX Universal site.
